title: Urgent Opening Hotel Manager at Six Senses India Capital India

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Hotel Manager at Six Senses India Capital India
jsonLd.description:
Six Senses India Capital India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Hotel Manager to join our dynamic team in Indore. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Six Senses India Capital India:
Six Senses India Capital India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in Revenue Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Six Senses India Capital India!
